bootstrap.confirmatory_gate: primary expected-L=5 one-sided 95% lower bound of mean daily net return > 0
bootstrap.fold_resampling: per-fold, that fold daily-net-return series is stationary-bootstrapped identically (same expected-L / replications / seed)
bootstrap.governing_source: v0.3 STATIONARY rule, established in v0.2, retained in v0.3, inherited by the owner-signed v1.0 freeze (70108c11); moving-block/L21/2000/seed42 REJECTED as transcription drift per MR002_Bootstrap_Source_Census_v1.0 + owner ruling 2026-07-20 (docs/review/comments.md Ruling 1)
bootstrap.mechanics: Politis-Romano stationary construction: p = 1/expected_L; first source index uniform in [0, n-1]; for every next bootstrap observation, with probability p start a new block at a uniformly selected source index, else advance the prior source index by one; wrap n-1 -> 0 (circular at the series boundary by construction); continue until exactly n observations. Fixed-length moving blocks are NOT substituted.
bootstrap.name: stationary (Politis-Romano, circular) bootstrap of daily net returns
bootstrap.reference_implementation: docs/review/mr002/evaluator/mr002_valoos_metrics.py (Increment 1 v1.2 synthetic-qualified primitive; the qualified evaluator binds the frozen impl)
bootstrap.sensitivity_role: expected-L=10 result reported as robustness evidence ONLY; NOT a separate PASS gate (the frozen v0.3 text does not make it a gate)
bootstrap.statistic: one-sided 95% percentile lower confidence bound of mean daily net return

cost_model_frozen_values.executable_artifact: PREREQUISITE (evaluator qualification binds file+blob+sha256+version+commit+tree+container+lock+synthetic evidence; not a placeholder value)

coverage_gates.denominators: per-window: numerator = observed complete records; denominator = eligible sessions x registered universe cardinality x required fields. Registered full-population denominator = 40,750 ticker-days (sealed manifest). Window-specific ticker-day denominators computed by the evaluator from the FROZEN universe table (metadata) at qualification - a prerequisite, not a placeholder value.

dsr.note: trials_N=5 owner-ratified per the countersigned ledger (A/B/C + RNG-001 + RNG-EntryLogic). DSR is now executable in the evaluator.
dsr.skew_kurtosis: sample skewness and kurtosis of the config-B net return series
dsr.trial_ledger_candidate: MR002_DSR_TrialLedger_Candidate_v1.0.json (N candidate 4 strict / 5 conservative; completeness unproven; owner countersigns)

gates_frozen.capacity: positive net edge at $10M under the 2% ADV participation cap

diversifier_tag.also_requires: cost-stress + DSR + breadth + trade-concentration + annual-profile + regime gates all pass
diversifier_tag.note: reported classification tag DIVERSIFIER_TIER_MET only; NOT a confirmatory PASS route

gates_frozen.maxdd_sample: validation + sealed OOS COMBINED (sealed OOS also reported separately)
gates_frozen.net_return_sample: sealed OOS at registered gross cap
gates_frozen.parameter_stability: configs A and C both net-profitable
gates_frozen.pbo: DIAGNOSTIC (N=3, underpowered) — NOT a PASS gate

regime_definitions.volatility_axis: SPY trailing 21-session annualized realized vol: High >= 20%, Low < 20%

regime_gates.low_exposure_rule: regimes with < 60 sessions exposure reported n/a, not failed

governing_gate_source.authority: the v0.3 gate table, frozen UNCHANGED into v1.0

sealed_access_protocol.first_access_proof: earliest CloudTrail GetObject event on the validation partition
sealed_access_protocol.mechanism: CloudTrail S3 data events enabled BEFORE access; dedicated IAM principal; explicit bucket/key DENY on the OOS partition during validation; validation-only access policy during validation; committed CloudTrail event export; policy-state snapshots before and after each execution
sealed_access_protocol.oos_unread_proof: access-policy isolation + audited ABSENCE of OOS GetObject events during validation (NOT an S3 last-access attribute, which S3 does not provide)

seam_rule.eligibility: score decision session t only if all formation sessions AND full realization horizon lie within the SAME governed window
seam_rule.fold_rule: 5 contiguous non-overlapping nearly-equal partitions of the eligible validation sessions; any remainder assigned to the FINAL fold (frozen v0.3 rule; here exactly 155 each, 775/5, zero remainder so boundaries identical to v1.0)
seam_rule.realization_horizon_ratification: OWNER-RATIFIED FINAL = 6 (next-open exit t+1..t+6). The 5-session close-exit alternative is REJECTED (historical rationale only; not executable configuration).

windows.calendar_authority: Sharadar SEP session dates (AAPL, continuously listed) per sealed manifest section_8a; RECONCILED identical to all-prices distinct dates in-window (hash b873421516ba5c4bbeb4ff3859e574f64f7251a956a2ba6ddea0e753981dad3f)
windows.endpoint_convention_status: horizon 6 owner-ratified final; alt_close_exit_* fields are the REJECTED alternative, retained for historical rationale only

evaluator_code_identities.status: PREREQUISITE (full evaluator qualification binds file+blob+sha256+version+commit+tree+container+lock+synthetic evidence; Phase 3A binds the current module SHA-256 as the reference to be re-verified at evaluator qualification)

governing_preregistration.correction_classification: INTEGRITY/GOVERNANCE (bootstrap transcription repair; not a trial)

scope: binds the governing Validation/OOS contract by full SHA-256; NO data opened; NO performance
